commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Come up, you horses; and rage, you chariots; and let the mighty men come forth; the Ethiopians and the Libyans, that handle the shield; and the Lydians, that handle and bend the bow. Soldiers formed one of the principal classes among the Egyptians. (Herodotus ii. ) Ethiopians. Hebrew, "Cush "in Lower Egypt, on the Red Sea. Hebrew, "Phut, another son of Cham, inhabiting the Nome Phtenethu "Ezechiel xxx. , and Nahum iii. Their situation is not known.
